_purpose: Universal app shell — the top nav bar projected onto EVERY portal page by gen_portal (one source, projected everywhere). Notifications + the account menu are DECLARED here; their backends wire later (auth-last). Edit this and re-run gen_portal to change the bar on all pages at once.
_pending: These are UI placeholders until wired: notifications (needs a notifications entity + feed), profile / account_settings (needs the users profile, auth-last), logout (needs sessions, auth-last). Tracked in BUILD_STATUS.

ui._purpose: UX features (BRD §11 Screens and UX) projected by gen_portal onto the portals.

timezone._purpose: Timestamps are stored UTC; displayed in this zone. mode 'auto' = the viewer's browser zone (Oman->Gulf, India->IST); mode 'fixed' = always 'zone'. Standard/home zone is IST (Asia/Kolkata).
timezone.label: IST
